
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Rat|kanji=庚子|romaji=kanoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=gēngzǐ|w=keng-tzŭ|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ tsɨ|y=geng1 zi2|j=geng1 zi2|ci=kɪŋ tsi|mc=kæŋ tsi|oc-bs=kˤraŋ tsi|qq=}}
{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|qid=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (Metal generates Water).  
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Rat (庚子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: koushi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongja (경자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tý

==Years of Yang Metal Rat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 40 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Metal Rat (庚子)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 40|en|AD 40|qid=Q23335|lt=40 AD|1=AD 40}}
* {{ill|AD 100|en|AD 100|qid=Q23879|lt=100 AD|1=AD 100}}
* {{ill|160|en|160|qid=Q24810|lt=160 AD|1=160}}
* {{ill|220|en|220|qid=Q30866|lt=220 AD|1=220}}
* {{ill|280|en|280|qid=Q32237|lt=280 AD|1=280}}
* {{ill|340|en|340|qid=Q47886|lt=340 AD|1=340}}
* {{ill|400|en|400|qid=Q25621|lt=400 AD|1=400}}
* {{ill|460|en|460|qid=Q30834|lt=460 AD|1=460}}
* {{ill|520|en|520|qid=Q32902|lt=520 AD|1=520}}
* {{ill|580|en|580|qid=Q32548|lt=580 AD|1=580}}
* {{ill|640|en|640|qid=Q30626|lt=640 AD|1=640}}
* {{ill|700|en|700|qid=Q23494|lt=700 AD|1=700}}
* {{ill|760|en|760|qid=Q30552|lt=760 AD|1=760}}
* {{ill|820|en|820|qid=Q24872|lt=820 AD|1=820}}
* {{ill|880|en|880|qid=Q23618|lt=880 AD|1=880}}
* {{ill|940|en|940|qid=Q23830|lt=940 AD|1=940}}
* {{ill|AD 1000|en|AD 1000|qid=Q18452|lt=1000 AD|1=AD 1000}}
|
* {{ill|1060|en|1060|qid=Q19385|lt=1060 AD|1=1060}}
* {{ill|1120|en|1120|qid=Q19542|lt=1120 AD|1=1120}}
* {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180 AD|1=1180}}
* {{ill|1240|en|1240|qid=Q5435|lt=1240 AD|1=1240}}
* {{ill|1300|en|1300|qid=Q5609|lt=1300 AD|1=1300}}
* {{ill|1360|en|1360|qid=Q6150|lt=1360 AD|1=1360}}
* {{ill|1420|en|1420|qid=Q6209|lt=1420 AD|1=1420}}
* {{ill|1480|en|1480|qid=Q6628|lt=1480 AD|1=1480}}
* {{ill|1540|en|1540|qid=Q6482|lt=1540 AD|1=1540}}
* {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600 AD|1=1600}}
* {{ill|1660|en|1660|qid=Q7001|lt=1660 AD|1=1660}}
* {{ill|1720|en|1720|qid=Q6908|lt=1720 AD|1=1720}}
* {{ill|1780|en|1780|qid=Q7716|lt=1780 AD|1=1780}}
* {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840 AD|1=1840}}
* {{ill|1900|en|1900|qid=Q2034|lt=1900 AD|1=1900}}
* {{ill|1960|en|1960|qid=Q3754|lt=1960 AD|1=1960}}
|
* {{ill|2020|en|2020|qid=Q25337|lt=2020 AD|1=2020}}
* {{ill|2080 AD|ja|2080年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2080|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2080 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2080年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2140 AD|ja|2140年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2140|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2140 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2200 AD|ja|2200年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2200|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2200 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2260 AD|ja|2260年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2260|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2260 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2320 AD|ja|2320年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2320|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2320 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2380 AD|ja|2380年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2380|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2380 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2440 AD|ja|2440年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2440|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2440 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2500 AD|ja|2500年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2500|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2500 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=25世紀|1=25th century|qid=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2560 AD|ja|2560年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2560|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2560 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2620 AD|ja|2620年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2620|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2620 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2680 AD|ja|2680年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2680|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2680 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2740 AD|ja|2740年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2740|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2740 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2800 AD|ja|2800年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2800|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2800 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2860 AD|ja|2860年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2860|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2860 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2920 AD|ja|2920年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2920|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2920 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2980 AD|ja|2980年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2980|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2980 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|qid=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|qid=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|qid=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442153}}.

==See Also==
* {{ill|Metal Rat (Xiliang)|ja|庚子 (西涼)|lt=Metal Rat (Xiliang)|lt_ja=庚子 (西涼)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|1=Gengzi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5371236}} – The era name of the dynasty of {{ill|China|ja|中国|1=China (region)|2=ja|3=中国|lt=China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q29520}}, during the {{ill|Sixteen Kingdoms|en|Sixteen Kingdoms|qid=Q683551|lt=Five Hu Sixteen Kingdoms period|1=Sixteen Kingdoms}}, of the kingdom {{ill|Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)|en|Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)|qid=Q994451|lt=Xiliang|1=Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)}}, covering 400–404 AD.
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Metal Rat|qq=ja|庚子|qq=Yang Metal Rat|version=98658363|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q904964|af|Metaalrot (astrologie)|cdo|Gĕng-cṳ̄|de|Metall-Ratte|hak|Kâng-chṳ́|ja|庚子|ko|경자|vi|Canh Tý|za|Gengceij|zh-min-nan|Keng-chú|zh-yue|庚子|zh|庚子|zh-min-nan|Bó͘-chîn|zh-yue|戊辰|cdo|Tsuch-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Drachteen|de|Yang Metal Rat|fr|Rat de métal|af|Houtdraak (astrologie)|de|Holz-Drachteen|en|Wood Dragon|fr|Dragon de boisboishak|it|Tsu-chṳ́id|ko|무진 (간지)|vi|Mậu Thìn|za|Mouzceij|zh|戊辰|ar|Yang Metal Rat}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
